symptoms.symptom_name: Ejaculation within ~1 minute of penetration with no control, every time

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Short intravaginal ejaculatory latency with lack of control and distress is the defining feature of premature ejaculation.

symptoms.symptom_name: Firm erections easily achieved and maintained until climax

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Reliable rigid erections exclude erectile dysfunction as the mechanism.
Intact erectile function localises the problem to the ejaculatory reflex rather than arousal/erection.

symptoms.symptom_name: Intense anticipatory performance anxiety before every encounter

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Performance anxiety amplifies sympathetic tone and is the central driver of the fear-of-failure loop.

symptoms.symptom_name: Acute panic attack — racing heart, breathlessness, sweating, tremor, sense of doom

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Abrupt-onset autonomic symptoms with dread after an acute stressor are characteristic of a panic attack.
Palpitations and chest tightness are non-specific; require a brief red-flag screen before attribution to panic.

symptoms.symptom_name: No painful ejaculation and no lower urinary tract symptoms

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of ejaculatory pain, perineal pain and LUTS makes prostatitis very unlikely.

symptoms.symptom_name: Negative screen for suicidal ideation / self-harm

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A negative self-harm screen is required to safely keep this a non-emergency disposition; a positive screen would mandate urgent escalation.

symptoms.symptom_name: Tachycardia and tachypnoea with mildly elevated blood pressure (clinician-measured vitals)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Sympathetic overdrive of an acute panic attack; objective vitals are a sealed clinician measurement — the AI infers autonomic arousal from the patient's reported sensations, not a measured rate.
Intact sensation and reflexes argue against an organic neurological cause; a sealed in-person finding not obtainable via telehealth.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Short latency with lack of control, intact erections, no pain/LUTS, and heavy performance anxiety together define a functional (non-organic) premature ejaculation.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Routine organic work-up (bloods / imaging) for the sexual complaint
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Premature ejaculation with a classic functional history needs no acute investigation; over-ordering medicalises a functional condition. Any longer-term work-up is a GP decision, not an acute telehealth action.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Brief cardiac red-flag screen (history) for the palpitations/chest tightness
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: A short history screen (exertional/pleuritic pain, radiation, syncope, cardiac history) is appropriate before attributing the acute autonomic symptoms to panic; no remote objective cardiac test is possible.
